Interface IUNTraceConfiguration2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that specify the properties of a utility network trace configuration 2.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("6978D9E3-861A-4F37-9E44-C3BA1972317F")]
public interface IUNTraceConfiguration2 : IUNTraceConfiguration
